content:
---
title: Hallia
aliases:
  - Hallia
---
Hallia is a city in [[Geography/Calaria/index|Calaria]] divided into numbered districts, with a river running through it.

### Districts & Layout

Hallia is organized into numbered districts. Travel between districts is restricted by particularly strong magic set up by the city's host, which prevents residents from teleporting or sliding freely between areas — public transit must be used instead.

The city's districts vary considerably in character by direction. The **Diamond District** is a relatively upscale area known for its jewelers and fine metal shops, situated near high-end residential neighborhoods. By contrast, the **voidward** side of the city is characterized by undeveloped land that feels like the far outskirts despite being geographically close to the city center. The voidward strata contain slums between the city center and the scrapyard at the city's edge, as well as factories that dump waste into the river running through Hallia — placed there to avoid legal consequences or harm to residents elsewhere.

### Transportation

Hallia operates a public trolley and tram system. The trolleys travel along a route called the **Horizon**, connecting different numbered districts such as Star 12. The tram network extends to the voidward side of the city, providing access to areas such as the scrapyard.

### Notable Locations

**Sableclutch Scrap** is a scrapyard located in the voidward industrial district, notable for its expansive grounds and mountains of trash. It is reachable by tram from the city center.

### Law Enforcement

**Blackline** is a private law enforcement company that generally polices the nicer parts of the city, operating in at least some of Hallia's districts.

---
tags:
  - Human
img: https://i.imgur.com/bfOqm7b.png
aliases:
  - Anouk
  - Anok
---
Anouk Marchal is a late 20s human female, with red hair and dark brown eyes. She's the fraternal twin of [[Anaïs Marchal|Anaïs]]. Anouk usually wears practical workshop jumpsuits, as anything fancier would likely burn or get stained by one of her experiments. She has a moderately sized raiment of the [[Iridescent Host|Host]].

Anouk is the more technologically-inclined of the twins. Her portion of the [[Org/Iconoclasm/index|Iconoclasm]] workshop is covered by multimeters, oscilloscopes, and other electrical accoutrement — including the area where rocket hammers are made. She tends to be more outgoing than her brother.

Neither Anouk nor Anaïs runs a magic item shop; rather, they are simply two people exceptionally skilled at crafting, and can produce healing potions if provided with the necessary components.

Anouk maintains a Rolodex-like collection of index cards containing contacts and job leads, which she uses to refer people to work opportunities. Among her contacts is an old friend who runs a scrapyard one district over in [[Sableclutch]] — known as **Sableclutch Scrap**, operated by a person called **Copperjaw**. This contact regularly hires couriers and similar workers, preferring to engage individuals directly rather than through a formal service.

---
tags:
  - Heart
aliases:
  - Ginny
---
Gin Soaked Rag, or Ginny for short, appears as a 6-foot-tall dishrag wearing a three-piece suit. The arms of the suit float in the air and end in gloves with mobility, despite the fact that the dishrag only occupies the center of the suit. His face is formed by the dishrag scrunching up, and when he moves some liquid appears to bead at the edges.

Ginny is the [[Hearts|Heart]] that maintains the [[Sin and Tonic]] fane. He works the bar, and can typically be found facing away from approaching patrons when tending it. He's friends with [[Illmari Vaino|Illmari]] and the rest of [[Org/Iconoclasm/index|Iconoclasm]], and is considered by most to be part of the team, despite his inability to leave his position behind the bar.

---
tags:
  - Half-Elf
img: https://i.imgur.com/6lc6MmR.png
aliases:
  - Illmari
---
Illmari is a late-60s half-elf male, with black, slicked back hair and scars on his face. He has a raiment of the [[Iridescent Host|Host]].

Illmari is the current proprietor of the [[Sin and Tonic]], where he is normally responsible for cooking food, and the founder of the mercenary group [[Org/Iconoclasm/index|Iconoclasm]]. He was one of the first to capitalize on hearing the [[Voidsong]], collecting like-minded people to investigate its source and meaning.

---
title: Pyrelight
aliases:
  - Pyrelight
---
Pyrelight is a faction that operates the front company [[Embercall Industries]].

### Known Associates

[[Tywelwyn Leatherhide]] has ordered materials from Embercall Industries.

---
tags:
  - Deerfolk
img: https://i.imgur.com/rhUETt8.png
aliases:
  - Tywelwyn
---
Tywelwyn is a 6'11" deerfolk, with dappled brown fur and tall, branching antlers. His muscles are far larger than could be achieved without magical or chemical intervention, and his skin is hot enough that his sweat sizzles as it's produced.

He is the founder and leader of the [[Org/Roundhat Gang/index|Roundhat Gang]], a protection racket in [[Geography/Calaria/Hallia/Sableclutch/index|Sableclutch]]. He was rumored to have gone crazy, hearing voices, but it appears that he's struck a deal with someone in [[Org/Pyrelight/index|Pyrelight]], and he has ordered materials from [[Embercall Industries]], a Pyrelight-associated supplier. Formerly unable to wield magic, he now pilots a simulacrum to work on his behalf.

---
tags:
  - Judge
  - Religious
aliases:
  - Scale
---
The Scale serves as the [[Judge of Ages|Judge]]'s hand as it seeks to impose order and balance across Færrin. The seat of the Scale's power is their Stronghold -- a citadel in the Opaline Mountains that sits on a conjunction of leylines.

The Scale operates as an extranational form of governance with stronger guarantees than any nation could provide. The organization is split into the following groups, in order of rarity:
  - **Pactbrokers** oversee contracts between parties, ensuring that both sides hold up their end, no matter what.
  - **Arbiters** track down those who have escaped justice and deliver them their due. The Scale empowers Arbiters to conduct bounty hunting, and does not extend that authority to unaffiliated individuals.
  - **Overseers** stop those seeking to seal the Gods away again, returning the planet to the Dark Ages.
  - **Timekeepers** prevent meddling with the time stream, preventing the creation of paradoxes.

The average person would be most familiar with the Pactbrokers -- in most cities, one can find a member of the Scale who will (for a fee) witness the signing of a contract. Magic imbued in the contract will monitor the signees, and deviating from one's responsibilities will bring the full might of the Scale down on the contract-breaker.

---
title: Anzu
---
Anzu has a raven companion named Othello.

---
title: Cobblejaw
---
Cobblejaw personally owns and keeps three guns for himself.

---
tags:
  - Dwarf
---
Copperjaw is an aging dwarven man who operates a Crusher and scrapyard. His most distinctive feature is his missing bottom jaw, replaced with a crude copper prosthetic vaguely shaped like a jaw — the origin of his name. He has a mashed-up, misshapen nose and a black eye, signs that he still gets into fights regularly despite his age.

He appears to be at the end of middle age or the beginning of elderly by dwarven standards, estimated to be around 120 to 130 years old.

Copperjaw is the kind of person who tests the grip strength of anyone who shakes his hand, regardless of their age, and responds competitively to a strong handshake. He is known to hire couriers or runners to deliver important items, sometimes using children carrying cases.

> [!note] Security
> Copperjaw keeps a Giant Crusher stationed at his scrapyard, which he relies on for security when dealing with unwanted visitors.

---
title: Goblinoid
aliases:
  - Goblinoids
---
Goblinoid is a term for a category of creatures that includes goblins and related kin.

Goblinoids are present in the working population of at least some urban and industrial areas, employed as factory laborers and commuting alongside other workers.

---
title: Helya
---
Helya is a settlement whose starward districts are characterized by older, poorly maintained buildings constructed when the tram line was first built, in anticipation of a boom that never materialized.

---
title: Masque District
---
The Masque District is a part of [[Geography/Calaria/Hallia/index|Hallia]] known for its hotels and as a destination for tourists.

---
title: Prime
aliases:
  - Zero
---
Prime (also called Zero) is a named station on the tram system, part of a numbered or tiered station naming convention that includes stations such as Void 2.

---
tags:
  - Centaur
---
Smiler is a towering centaur standing approximately nine feet tall at full height, forcing him to stoop beneath the low ceiling of his establishment. He wears a stained white t-shirt as his only upper garment. Multiple yellowish metal bands adorn both arms, and his ears bear flare gauges with gems embedded in them. His long beard is braided in the same style as his tail, with gems woven throughout both.

Smiler is the proprietor of the [[Org/Roundhat Gang/index|Undertable]] and operates as a fence. [[Johnny]] has a prior working relationship with him, having dealt with Smiler on at least one or two previous occasions. Smiler extends a friends discount to associates of Johnny, reasoning that a friend of his friend would not inform on him to law enforcement.

---
title: Threshold Authority
aliases:
  - TA
---
The Threshold Authority (commonly abbreviated **TA**) is the local law enforcement organization operating in the area.

Officers of the Threshold Authority wear a greenish uniform bearing a large **TA** insignia.

---
title: Undertable
aliases:
  - Under Table
---
The Undertable is a narrow, squished shop wedged between two buildings in a space too large for an alleyway but too small for a standard building. It has no street-facing windows, and its only signage is a handwritten sign reading "Under Table" accompanied by a crude drawing of a table.

The interior is a cramped room filled with tables stacked high with miscellaneous goods, including kitchen appliances, loose jewelry, radios in various states of deconstruction, and a large number of firearms.

--- aliases: - Host - the Host --- The Iridescent Host is the patron deity of the [[Org/Iridescent Church/index|Iridescent Church]] and, by extension, the Thearchy of [[Geography/Calaria/index|Calaria]]. Above all else, the Host favors the prosperity of her people in spite of (or to the detriment of) others. She commands her followers to create great works and establish lasting monuments such that the reputation of the Host endures the ages. **Category** : Outer God
**Edicts** L: Establish cultural superiority, create great works
**Anathema** :: Forgo credit for your accomplishments
**[[Divine Raiment]]** :: Pearlescent, shimmering
**[[Celestial Prescence]]** :: Aurora ### Devotee Benefits **Divine Ability** :: Charisma or Wisdom
**Divine Font** :: harm or heal
**Divine Sanctification** :: can choose holy or unholy
**Divine Skill** :: Diplomacy
**Favored Weapon** :: [mace](https://2e.aonprd.com/Weapons.aspx?ID=362)
**Domains** :: [confidence](https://2e.aonprd.com/Domains.aspx?ID=67), [cities](https://2e.aonprd.com/Domains.aspx?ID=66), [indulgence](https://2e.aonprd.com/Domains.aspx?ID=79), [passion](https://2e.aonprd.com/Domains.aspx?ID=88), [toil](https://2e.aonprd.com/Domains.aspx?ID=122), [wealth](https://2e.aonprd.com/Domains.aspx?ID=99)
**Cleric Spells** :: 1st: [soothe](https://2e.aonprd.com/Spells.aspx?ID=1678), 4th: [creation](https://2e.aonprd.com/Spells.aspx?ID=1477), 6th: [collective transposition](https://2e.aonprd.com/Spells.aspx?ID=1978)

---
tags:
  - Dwarf
img: https://i.imgur.com/rkEMbUm.png
aliases:
  - Elias
---
Elias Ramsey is an elderly, dark-skinned dwarven male. He has wispy blonde-gray hair on his balding head, and he keeps a short-trimmed mustache and beard. He wears tweed suits with elbow patches, and keeps a small pair of reading glasses on a chain around his neck. He has a small raiment of the [[Iridescent Host|Host]].

Elias is the group curmudgeon, often doing things his way or not at all. Despite this, he serves as an excellent quartermaster for the group, able to locate things that had been well lost by the other members of [[Org/Iconoclasm/index|Iconoclasm]].

---
title: Roundhat Gang
aliases:
  - Roundhat Gang
  - Roundhack
---
The Roundhat Gang is a protection racket in [[Geography/Calaria/Hallia/Sableclutch/index|Sableclutch]]. Its run by [[Tywelwyn Leatherhide]] out of [[The Crowded Flea]].  Recently, it appears to have established some kind of partnership with [[Org/Pyrelight/index|Pyrelight]].
